title: Crispy Italian Lamb Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly Italian dish featuring sweet and crispy lamb loin chops, suitable for pescatarian diets.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For brushing on chops and stir-fry sauce

ingredients.name: Italian Herbs (Oregano, Basil)
ingredients.notes: For seasoning the lamb and stir-fry sauce

instructions: Pat lamb chops dry with paper towels.
Season both sides of the chops lightly with salt and pepper, then coat them evenly in flour.
In a medium bowl, mix together garlic powder, Italian herbs, soy sauce, vegetable oil, and chicken broth to make stir-fry sauce. Brush half of the marinade onto each lamb chop for greasing.

Place seasoned chops on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and drizzle remaining marinade over them. Bake in preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until internal temperature reaches 145°F (63°C).
While the lamb cooks, prepare the stir-fry sauce by combining all ingredients in a medium saucepan and bring to a simmer.
When chops are done, spoon half of the hot marinade over each chop before serving. Garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro if desired.
